descFull: Yazi and Zellij with smart defaults & awesome plugins give helix/nvim a powerful yazi sidebar, git integrations, a configurable popup system (lazygit, a config ui, etc), zoxide integrations, zjstatus widgets, and more. Your terminal IDE.  Written in rust and blazingly fast. Available via flake/home-manager. One line install.
